game_name: ToeJam & Earl in Panic on Funkotron

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic for identifying enemy proximity
Requires radar usage and environmental awareness
Resource management for triggering level events
High-difficulty obstacle avoidance for premium rewards

element_introduction_order.element: Lamont the Funkapotamus collectibles (10 hidden objects)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Optional 100% completion challenge for best ending

typical_relief_triggers: Capturing an Earthling completes level progress
Finding a present with useful bonus
Successful parkour passage through dangerous area
typical_tension_triggers: Entering Hyper Funk Zone with obstacles
Approaching unknown area with potential enemies
Running low on collected Earthlings before level completion
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Hunt-and-capture rhythm with exploratory respite; side-scrolling structure provides steady forward momentum punctuated by backtracking for hidden enemies and environment interaction

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Presents scattered throughout; hidden Earthlings require radar and environmental inspection; Lamont collectibles hidden in non-critical areas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden Earthlings in environment require radar detection; Hyper Funk Zone gateways are optional high-difficulty portals; Lamont objects distributed for completionists

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to radar, jar capture, and basic platforming; Earthlings initially visible and accessible
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of hidden Earthlings requiring radar mastery; environmental interaction with coins/meters; mini-game challenges
difficulty_curve.late_game: Hyper Funk Zone obstacles; complex hidden enemy placement; optional Lamont collectible challenges
notable_spikes: First encounter with hidden Earthlings (requires radar proficiency)
Hyper Funk Zone entry (obstacle avoidance intensity jump)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level requires locating and capturing all stowed-away Earthlings via radar and jar mechanics before advancing; completion metric is binary (all captured = progress)
Side-scrolling format with optional areas containing presents, coins, mini-games, and hidden Earthlings; rewards thorough investigation over speed-running
Gateway-accessible optional high-difficulty mini-stages focused on obstacle avoidance rather than enemy capture; grants premium rewards
